**Analyzing JSON output**

I need to structure the content in JSON format based on a specific schema. The Italian text mentions a regional train strike on "Thursday 14 December from 9 AM to 5 PM." This indicates an upcoming single-day event, so the "startDate" would be "2023-12-14 09:00:00" and the "endDate" would be "2023-12-14 17:00:00." I should also classify the location type as "REGIONAL." It looks like I have the important details figured out!
